title: Microsoft teams integration and Monday
excerpt: I have a Microsoft Team with a collection of Monday users.  Those Monday users are a mix of Member, Guest and Viewer access levels. Will the guest and viewer users be able to view the board via the Teams channel?

posts.author: lost_gweedo (Will Strand)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a Microsoft Team with a collection of Monday users. Those Monday users are a mix of Member, Guest and Viewer access levels. Will the guest and viewer users be able to view the board via the Teams channel?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @lost_gweedo,

Guests will be able to view the board via the teams channel, however viewers will not be able to I am afraid! Hope this helps!

posts.author: MonicaWS (Monica Wiger Sørensen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, why is that? I mean, when they can log on their Monay account and view the boards there, why can they not do the same via Teams? Does it help to change from a standard Plan to Pro?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @MonicaWS! Because viewers cannot use the API, they cannot use applications, and as a result they are unable to view this data within the Microsoft teams app - let me know if this makes sense!
